name: PEAK_PUBLICATION_YEAR_BY_ASSIGNEE
description: Find the peak publication year for an assignee.
cypher: MATCH (a:Assignee {name:$assignee})<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year) WITH a.name AS assignee, y.year AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count ORDER BY patent_count DESC, year ASC RETURN assignee, year, patent_count LIMIT 1;
